entry.value: [ { "id":"auth0", "authFlow":"oauth", "apiPath":"openai", "displayName":"Connect with OpenAI", "description":"Sign in via OpenAI account", "icon":"person.badge.key", "colorHex":"#00997F", "helpURL":"", "keyPrefix":"", "keyMinLength":0, "keyPlaceholder":"", "enabled":true }, { "id":"key1", "authFlow":"api_key", "apiPath":"openai", "displayName":"OpenAI API Key", "description":"Use your OpenAI API key", "icon":"key.fill", "colorHex":"#00997F", "helpURL":"https://platform.openai.com/api-keys", "keyPrefix":"sk-", "keyMinLength":20, "keyPlaceholder":"sk-...", "enabled":true }, { "id":"key2", "authFlow":"api_key", "apiPath":"anthropic", "displayName":"Anthropic API Key", "description":"Use your Anthropic API key", "icon":"brain.head.profile", "colorHex":"#CC7F33", "helpURL":"https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys", "keyPrefix":"sk-ant-", "keyMinLength":20, "keyPlaceholder":"sk-ant-api03-...", "enabled":true }, { "id":"key3", "authFlow":"api_key", "apiPath":"glm", "displayName":"GLM API Key", "description":"Use your Zhipu AI API key", "icon":"sparkles", "colorHex":"#6633CC", "helpURL":"https://open.bigmodel.cn/usercenter/apikeys", "keyPrefix":"", "keyMinLength":10, "keyPlaceholder":"your-key-here", "enabled":true }, { "id":"key4", "authFlow":"api_key", "apiPath":"minimax", "displayName":"MiniMax API Key", "description":"Use your MiniMax API key", "icon":"waveform", "colorHex":"#1A80E5", "helpURL":"https://api.minimax.chat/user-center/basic-information/interface-key", "keyPrefix":"", "keyMinLength":10, "keyPlaceholder":"your-key-here", "enabled":true }, { "id":"key5", "authFlow":"api_key", "apiPath":"openrouter", "displayName":"OpenRouter API Key", "description":"Use your OpenRouter API key", "icon":"arrow.triangle.branch", "colorHex":"#1AB266", "helpURL":"https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys", "keyPrefix":"sk-or-", "keyMinLength":20, "keyPlaceholder":"sk-or-...", "enabled":true } ]
